'''鈭歞h-k-l''' ('''kadhakal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:peragrate|peragrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-k-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:peragrate|peragrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-k-l
|-
! Lemma
| kadhakal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhakal|thidhakal]] || [[word:jidhakal|jidhakal]] || [[word:shidhakal|shidhakal]] || [[word:kidhakal|kidhakal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhakal|thuthudhakal]] || [[word:jujudhakal|jujudhakal]] || [[word:shushudhakal|shushudhakal]] || [[word:kukudhakal|kukudhakal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhakal|thudhakal]] || [[word:judhakal|judhakal]] || [[word:shudhakal|shudhakal]] || [[word:kudhakal|kudhakal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhakal|thudhakal]] || [[word:judhakal|judhakal]] || [[word:shudhakal|shudhakal]] || [[word:kudhakal|kudhakal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhakal|thedhakal]] || [[word:jedhakal|jedhakal]] || [[word:shedhakal|shedhakal]] || [[word:kedhakal|kedhakal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhakal|thothodhakal]] || [[word:jojodhakal|jojodhakal]] || [[word:shoshodhakal|shoshodhakal]] || [[word:kokodhakal|kokodhakal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhakal|thodhakal]] || [[word:jodhakal|jodhakal]] || [[word:shodhakal|shodhakal]] || [[word:kodhakal|kodhakal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhakal|thodhakal]] || [[word:jodhakal|jodhakal]] || [[word:shodhakal|shodhakal]] || [[word:kodhakal|kodhakal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhakal|dhakal]] || [[word:dhakal|dhakal]] || [[word:dhakal|dhakal]] || [[word:dhakal|dhakal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhakal|dhakal]] || [[word:dhakal|dhakal]] || [[word:dhakal|dhakal]] || [[word:dhakal|dhakal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhakal|dhakal]] || [[word:dhakal|dhakal]] || [[word:dhakal|dhakal]] || [[word:dhakal|dhakal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhakal|dhakal]] || [[word:dhakal|dhakal]] || [[word:dhakal|dhakal]] || [[word:dhakal|dhakal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhakal|th忙dhakal]] || [[word:j忙dhakal|j忙dhakal]] || [[word:sh忙dhakal|sh忙dhakal]] || [[word:k忙dhakal|k忙dhakal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhakal|thathadhakal]] || [[word:jajadhakal|jajadhakal]] || [[word:shashadhakal|shashadhakal]] || [[word:kakadhakal|kakadhakal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhakal|thadhakal]] || [[word:jadhakal|jadhakal]] || [[word:shadhakal|shadhakal]] || [[word:kadhakal|kadhakal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhakal|thadhakal]] || [[word:jadhakal|jadhakal]] || [[word:shadhakal|shadhakal]] || [[word:kadhakal|kadhakal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhakal|shadhakal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhakal|goshadhakal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhakal|gokishadhakal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhakaln眉|shadhakaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhakalnkn眉|goshadhakalnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhakaln眉|gokishadhakaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhakalsh毛|shadhakalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhakalnksh毛|goshadhakalnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhakalsh毛|gokishadhakalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhakalro|shadhakalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhakalnkro|goshadhakalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhakalro|gokishadhakalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhakalmu|shadhakalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhakalnkmu|goshadhakalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhakalmu|gokishadhakalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhakalsher|shadhakalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhakalnksher|goshadhakalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhakalsher|gokishadhakalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhakalng|shadhakalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhakalnkng|goshadhakalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhakalng|gokishadhakalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhakalya|shadhakalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhakalnkya|goshadhakalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhakalya|gokishadhakalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhakalyam|shadhakalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhakalnkyam|goshadhakalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhakalyam|gokishadhakalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhakaln眉sh毛|shadhakaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhakalnkn眉sh毛|goshadhakalnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhakaln眉sh毛|gokishadhakaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhakaln眉ro|shadhakaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhakalnkn眉ro|goshadhakalnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhakaln眉ro|gokishadhakaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhakaln眉mu|shadhakaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhakalnkn眉mu|goshadhakalnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhakaln眉mu|gokishadhakaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhakalsh毛n眉|shadhakalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhakalnksh毛n眉|goshadhakalnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhakalsh毛n眉|gokishadhakalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhakalsh毛ro|shadhakalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhakalnksh毛ro|goshadhakalnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhakalsh毛ro|gokishadhakalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhakalsh毛mu|shadhakalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhakalnksh毛mu|goshadhakalnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhakalsh毛mu|gokishadhakalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhakalron眉|shadhakalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhakalnkron眉|goshadhakalnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhakalron眉|gokishadhakalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhakalrosh毛|shadhakalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhakalnkrosh毛|goshadhakalnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhakalrosh毛|gokishadhakalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhakalromu|shadhakalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhakalnkromu|goshadhakalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhakalromu|gokishadhakalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhakalmun眉|shadhakalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhakalnkmun眉|goshadhakalnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhakalmun眉|gokishadhakalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhakalmush毛|shadhakalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhakalnkmush毛|goshadhakalnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhakalmush毛|gokishadhakalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhakalmuro|shadhakalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhakalnkmuro|goshadhakalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhakalmuro|gokishadhakalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
